items.blurb: Found the coziest coffee shops tucked into the Green Mountains.
A warm cup on a cold Minneapolis morning. The land of 10,000 lakes never disappoints.
Austin's bakery scene keeps getting better. These macarons were perfection.
A dessert worthy of the city that never sleeps. Manhattan magic on a plate.
Home sweet home. The Austin skyline at golden hour never gets old.
Autumn in Vermont is a painter's dream. Every road is a postcard.
A visit back to the heartland. Nebraska always feels like coming home.
Rocky shores and lighthouse views. Maine's coast is wild and wonderful.
A New Yorker at heart. The energy of the city is unmatched.
